productDisplayName: Puma Women's Vesta Runner NM Grey Violet Blue Shoe
description: The classic heritage look of puma is applied in modern lightweight tooling in the Vest Runner for an uber cool sporty-chic look. The leather and nylon upper offers maximum protection and support, while the textured rubber outsole provides greater grip and stability when running.Upper Nylon and suede combination upper Padded collar and tongue Patent-leather formstripe logo Fine mesh lining with a removable eco-OrthoLite footbed for all-day comfort Midsole Low-profile, injected-moulded EVA midsole for enhanced cushioning Outsole EverTrack rubber outsole compound with high abrasion-wear characteristics for durability
